title: Understanding cancer at a genetic level with AI
summary: Dr. Daudi Jjingo's team at Makerere University in Uganda uses AlphaFold, AlphaGenome, and Antigravity to identify genetic targets for breast cancer vaccine development. The researchers analyzed 15,000 protein binding sites and narrowed results to 15 viable targets for validation, demonstrating how AI tools enable resource-constrained research teams.
